title: T-013 — GET /api/scheduler/runs/:id and /:id/status endpoints
prompt:
# T-013 — GET /api/scheduler/runs/:id and /:id/status endpoints

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 GET /api/scheduler/runs/:run_id, §8.2 GET /:run_id/status, §8.3 SLO
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement two GET endpoints: full detail (run + assignments + override log) <1s P95 and lightweight status poll <50ms P95.

## Implementation contract
1. Route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/runs/[runId]/route.ts`: GET returns scheduler_run row + scheduler_assignments[] joined with override audit; uses single Drizzle query with leftJoin.
2. Route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/runs/[runId]/status/route.ts`: GET returns {status, progress_pct, messages[]} only — no assignments hydration.
3. RBAC: read for Planner Advanced + Scheduling Officer + Prod Manager; 403 otherwise.
4. Tenant scoping: WHERE tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id') (RLS enforces too).

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/runs/[runId]/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/runs/[runId]/status/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/queries.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/runs/[runId]/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a completed run, when GET /:id runs, then 200 returned with run row + assignments[] sorted by optimizer_rank ASC
2. Given a queued run, when GET /:id/status runs, then 200 returned with {status:'queued', progress_pct:0} in <50ms (assert response time in test)
3. Given a different tenant's run_id, when GET runs under another tenant, then 404 returned (RLS hides; do not leak existence)

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/runs/[runId]/__tests__/route.test.ts asserting 200 shape + status latency + 404 cross-tenant
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/runs/[runId]/route'

## Risk red lines
- Do not return 403 instead of 404 for cross-tenant access (information leak)
- Do not hydrate assignments in status endpoint (perf SLO would break)
- Do not skip RLS scoping

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement GET /:id (full detail) and /:id/status (lightweight) endpoints respecting SLO + RLS + cross-tenant 404.
pipeline_inputs.details: Two routes share a query helper. Detail route does single leftJoin to fetch assignments + override audit; status route reads only the run row's status/progress_pct. Both enforce RBAC + RLS. Cross-tenant returns 404 not 403.
out_of_scope: Do not implement WebSocket push (optional per FR-07-E1-005, separate task)
Do not include WO row hydration (UI fetches via 04-PLAN endpoints)
Do not implement re-run action here (T-046)
acceptance_criteria: Given a completed run, when GET /:id runs, then 200 returned with run row + assignments[] sorted by optimizer_rank ASC
Given a queued run, when GET /:id/status runs, then 200 returned with {status:'queued', progress_pct:0} in <50ms
Given a different tenant's run_id, when GET runs under another tenant, then 404 returned (no leak)

risk_red_lines: Do not hydrate assignments in status endpoint
